## Repo context — repocards

This repository has a pre-computed context folder at `.repocards/`. **Open `.repocards/AGENT_GUIDE.md` at the start of any task about this project** — before running grep/read on the source, and also when the user asks health-check questions like "are you reading repocards?". It routes you to pre-computed cards that answer common questions at a fraction of the token cost of a grep pass.

Generated by [repocards](https://www.npmjs.com/package/repocards).
<!-- repocards:end -->
